description: Marriage contract (ketubba). Large and almost completely preserved. Location: Tyre. Dated: Thursday, 12 Kislev 4784 AM, which is 28 November 1023 CE. The scribe is probably Yosef b. Yaʿaqov ha-Kohen (active in Tyre, 1011–37). Groom: Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen of Safed. Bride: Raḥel bt. [...] b. Avraham, a virgin. (Information from Friedman's edition.)
description_he: כתובה, גדולה וכמעט שלמה. צור, 28 בנובמבר 1023. חתן: נתן בן שלמה הכהן מצפת, כלה: רחל בת אברהם, בתולה.
